generic.UNEXPECTED: Something went wrong. Please try again.
generic.NETWORK: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
generic.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
generic.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to perform this action.
generic.CONFLICT: This action conflicts with existing data.
generic.UNIQUE_VIOLATION: A record with this data already exists.
generic.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please try again later.
generic.UNPROCESSABLE: The request could not be processed.
generic.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.
generic.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
generic.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
generic.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.

auth.ACCOUNT_LOCKED: Your account is temporarily locked. Please try again later.
auth.ACCOUNT_PENDING: Your account is not yet activated. Please check your email.
auth.ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED: Your account is suspended. Please contact your administrator.
auth.PASSWORD_EXPIRED: Your password has expired. Please set a new one.
auth.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least {{min}} characters long.
auth.PASSWORD_NEEDS_UPPERCASE: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
auth.PASSWORD_NEEDS_LOWERCASE: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
auth.PASSWORD_NEEDS_DIGIT: Password must contain at least one digit.
auth.PASSWORD_NEEDS_SPECIAL: Password must contain at least one special character.
auth.ACTIVATION_INVALID: Your activation link is invalid or has expired.
auth.RESET_INVALID: Your password reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.TWO_FACTOR_REQUIRED: Please enter the verification code we sent you.
auth.TWO_FACTOR_INVALID: The verification code is invalid or expired.
auth.TWO_FACTOR_EXPIRED: Verification session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.TWO_FACTOR_TOO_MANY_ATTEMPTS: Too many attempts. Please sign in again.

user.EMAIL_EXISTS: A user with this email already exists.
user.AGENCY_NOT_ASSIGNED: Agency Manager has no agency assigned.
user.AGENCY_ROLE_MISSING: "Agency User" role is not configured. Contact a System Administrator.
user.AGENCY_MAX_USERS: Agency has reached the maximum user limit of {{maxUsers}}. Contact a System Administrator to increase the limit.
user.SYSTEM_ADMIN_ONLY_CREATE: Only System Admins can create System Admin users.
user.SYSTEM_ADMIN_ONLY_EDIT: Only System Admins can edit System Admin users.
user.SYSTEM_ADMIN_ONLY_ASSIGN: Only System Admins can assign the System Admin role.
user.SYSTEM_ADMIN_ONLY_DELETE: Only System Admins can delete System Admin users.
user.PROFILE_LOCKED_EDIT: This user has been approved by Tempworks. Ask a System Administrator to enable edits for this user.
user.PROFILE_LOCKED_DELETE: This user has been approved by Tempworks. Ask a System Administrator to enable deletion for this user.

applicant.AGENCY_SCOPE: You can only edit candidates in your own agency.
applicant.AGENCY_DELETE_REQUEST_REQUIRED: Agency users cannot directly delete candidates. Please submit a delete request.
applicant.AGENCY_CHANGE_FORBIDDEN: Agency users cannot change a candidate's agency.
applicant.AGENCY_CONVERT_FORBIDDEN: Agency users cannot convert candidates to employees.
applicant.CAPTCHA_REQUIRED: Please complete the CAPTCHA to continue.
applicant.CAPTCHA_FAILED: CAPTCHA verification failed. Please try again.
applicant.PENDING_APPROVAL_WORKFLOW: This candidate is pending Tempworks approval and cannot enter the workflow yet.
applicant.PENDING_APPROVAL_CONVERT: This candidate is pending Tempworks approval and cannot be converted yet.
applicant.REJECTED_CANNOT_CONVERT: This candidate was rejected and cannot be converted.
applicant.CANDIDATE_ID_ASSIGNED: A Candidate identifier has already been assigned to this applicant.
applicant.CONVERT_REQUIRES_CANDIDATE: Only Candidates can be converted to employees. Convert the Lead to a Candidate first.
applicant.FINANCE_CANDIDATE_ONLY: Financial profile is only available for Candidates.
applicant.DELETE_REQUEST_PENDING: A delete request for this candidate is already pending review.
applicant.DELETE_REQUEST_REVIEWED: This request has already been reviewed.

document.NO_ATTRIBUTION_USER: No users found to attribute upload to.
document.ALREADY_VERIFIED: Document is already {{status}} and cannot be re-verified.

workflow.STAGE_NOT_IN_WORKFLOW: Stage does not belong to this workflow.
workflow.STAGE_NOT_FOUND_FOR_EMPLOYEE: Workflow stage not found for this employee.
workflow.ALREADY_ASSIGNED: Candidate already has an active assignment in this workflow.
workflow.ALREADY_AT_STAGE: Candidate is already active in this stage.
workflow.REASSIGN_REQUIRES_ADMIN: Candidate is already assigned to "{{workflowName}}". Only a System Admin can reassign a candidate to a different workflow.
workflow.USER_ACCESS_EXISTS: User already has access to this workflow.
workflow.USER_ACCESS_NOT_FOUND: User does not have access to this workflow.
workflow.EMPLOYEE_ASSIGN_FORBIDDEN: Workflows can only be assigned to candidates. Assign this person while still on the Candidates list.
workflow.EMPLOYEE_MODIFY_FORBIDDEN: Workflows can only be modified on candidates. Employees no longer move through workflow stages.
workflow.BULK_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Refusing to process more than {{limit}} candidates in a single bulk assign.
workflow.APPROVAL_NOT_REQUIRED: This stage does not require approval.
workflow.APPROVAL_PENDING: Stage "{{stageName}}" is awaiting approval. {{approved}} of {{required}} required approver(s) have approved.
workflow.RESPONSIBLE_ONLY: Only the responsible users assigned to "{{stageName}}" may advance the candidate.
workflow.NOT_AN_APPROVER: You are not an approver for "{{stageName}}". Only assigned approvers may approve this stage.

employee.EMAIL_EXISTS: An employee with email {{email}} already exists.

validation.FAILED: Validation failed. Please review the highlighted fields.
validation.EMAIL_INVALID: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.PHONE_INVALID: Please enter a valid phone number.
validation.PATTERN_INVALID: This value does not match the required pattern.
validation.ALPHANUMERIC_EXPECTED: Only letters and digits are allowed.
validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.
